get.description:
> this is a quote |Sit amet | Lorem dolor | Cosectetur elit| |-------|------|-------| |`ipsum` | augue | SAGGITTIS | This returns a list of storage
providers available to your user. Storage providers represent \n a static connection details to a storage system and are used as \r\n the base for user specific accounts.

parameters.name: providerName
parameters.description: Optional parameter to filter by provider name

get.description: Gets one or more Account object(s). THese account objects are created by the logged in user

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Optional parameter to return just the account object specififed

post.description:
Create new account object for the current user using provider credentials supplied in the request.
*Note*: If the provider account requires OAuth to connect, use the 
``` /il-storage/accounts/authorize/{providerId} ``` 
 to setup the account.

requestBody.description: Details for the account you are creating

post.description: Creates a new account for the logged in user by connecting to the supplied provider's OAuth endpoints.

parameters.name: providerId
parameters.description: ID of the storage provider to connect to. See `/il-storage/providers`

put.description: Update an account with new information (Name, account token, etc)

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account id for the account to be updated

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account id for the account to be deleted

get.description: Gets all repositories for a given Account Id. Not all providers support this call. If a provider does not, no repositories will be returned.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account id to get the repositories for

get.description: Retrieves a specific object from the account using the objects ID.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID of the users storage account you wish to work with.

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: ID of the object to retrieve

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description:
Controls what fields are returned. Can be one or both of the following:
- `children` - returns a list of child objects
- `metaData` - returns the metaData for the obejct

**Default** if not provided will return both children \r\n and metaData

put.description: Updates a single storage container for a given AccountId.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: application/cdmi-container

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account id to filter the result

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: objectId of the content to be updated (folder/document id)

parameters.name: newName
parameters.description: The new name of the folder.

post.description: Create a Storage Container for given Storage Account.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: application/cdmi-container

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Storage Account Id

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: The format to be specified is ContainerId/NewContainerName. To create a container inside of an existing container specify the parent container as ContainerId. Use slash ('/') to separate ContainerId and NewContainerName. To create new container in the root - provide NewContainerName only. NewContainerName is the name specified for the container object to be created.

delete.description: Delete a single storage content for a given AccountId.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account id to filter the result

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: objectId to filter the result (folder/document id)

get.description:
Gets to level storage contents for a given AccountId.
Path params of **accountId** determines  for which account details needs to be get

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account id to filter the result

get.description: Gets single storage container for a given AccountId.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account id to filter the result

parameters.name: parentContainerPath
parameters.description: path to filter the result (folder/document id)

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: we'll have field=children for returning children, fields=metaData for returning metadata and fields=children;metadata to return both. If we pass nothing it will return both.

put.description: Updates a single storage container for a given AccountId.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: application/cdmi-container

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account id to filter the result

parameters.name: parentContainerPath
parameters.description: path of folder to be rename in format ParentPath/ContainerPath where ParentPath can be zero or more parent folder names separated by slash ('/') and ContainerPath will be folder name to be renamed.

parameters.name: newName
parameters.description: The new name of the folder.

post.description: Create a Storage Container by path for given Storage Account.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: application/cdmi-container

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Storage Account Id

parameters.name: parentContainerPath
parameters.description: The format to be specified is ContainerName/NewContainerName. ContainerName is zero or more intermediate containers that already exist, with one slash (i.e.,/) between each pair of container names. To create new container in the root - provide NewContainerName only. NewContainerName is the name of container to be created.

delete.description: Delete a single storage content for a given AccountId and Path.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account id to filter the result

parameters.name: parentContainerPath
parameters.description: path of folder to be deleted

get.description: Gets single storage data object for a given objectName

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account id to filter the result

parameters.name: objectName
parameters.description: Name of Object. Can also contain the path

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: If user will pass fields=metaData, it will return metadata. If user will pass nothing it will download the file.

Content-Type.description: The content type returned shall be the mimetype field in the data object.

Location.description: The server shall respond with the URI that the reference redirects to if the object is a reference.

post.description: Create a Storage DataObject for given Storage Account. This endpoint does not work in interactive mode. Please use another REST API testing tool such as curl, Postman, Paw, etc.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: application/cdmi-object

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Storage Account Id

parameters.name: objectName
parameters.description: The format to be specified is ContainerName/NewDataObjectName. To create a dataobject inside an existing container specify the complete path in ContainerName. Use slash ('/') to separate ContainerName and NewDataObjectName. To create new container in the root - provide NewDataObjectName only. NewDataObjectName is the name specified for the dataobject to be created.

requestBody.description: New DataObject content to be created should be passed in request body

delete.description: Delete a single storage content for a given objectName.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account id to filter the result

parameters.name: objectName
parameters.description: Name of Object. Can also contain the path

patch.description: Update/rename a single storage content for a given AccountId. This endpoint does not work in interactive mode to update file contents. Please use REST API testing tool such as curl, Postman, Paw, etc.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: application/cdmi-object

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account id to filter the result

parameters.name: objectName
parameters.description: The format to be specified is ContainerName/DataObjectName. ContainerName can be zero or more root level folders separated by slash ('/'). DataObjectName is the name with extenstion of the file to be updated.

parameters.name: newName
parameters.description: The new name of the file. it should be given if you want to rename the file

get.description: Gets single storage data object for a given AccountId and ObjectID

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account id to filter the result

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: object ID to retreive

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: If user will pass fields=metaData call will return metadata. If user will pass nothing it will download the file.

post.description: Create a Storage DataObject for given Storage Account. This endpoint does not work in interactive mode. Please use another REST API testing tool such as curl, Postman, Paw, etc.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: application/cdmi-object

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Storage Account Id

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: The format to be specified is ContainerId/NewDataObjectName. To create a container inside of an existing container specify the parent container as ContainerId. Use slash ('/') to separate ContainerId and NewDataObjectName. To create new container in the root - provide NewDataObjectName only. NewDataObjectName is the name specified for the container object to be created.

requestBody.description: New DataObject content to be created should be passed in request body

delete.description: Delete a single storage content for a given AccountId.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account id to filter the result

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: objectId to filter the result (folder/document id)

patch.description: Updates a Storage DataObject for given Storage Account. This endpoint does not work in interactive mode to update file contents. Please use REST API testing tool such as curl, Postman, Paw, etc.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: application/cdmi-object

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Storage Account Id

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: Id of the file to be updated

parameters.name: newName
parameters.description: The new name of the file. it should be given if you want to rename the file

requestBody.description:
Copies a file from Dropbox into Intralinks Via.
Currently, only the 'destination' parameter supports the use of the 'asset' object therein. In future interations of the API,
the 'asset' parameter will be supported in the 'source' parameter as well.

objectName.description: The name of the document/data object

mimeType.description: the Mime Type of the Document - for Folder it will be empty

parentID.description: the parent folder ID for this document

completionStatus.description: A string indicating if the object is still in the process of being created or updated by another operation, and after that operation is complete, indicates if it was successfully created or updated or if an error occurred. The value shall be the string "Processing", the string "Complete", or an error string starting with the value "Error".

parentID.description: the parent folder ID for this container/Folder

completionStatus.description: A string indicating if the object is still in the process of being created or updated by another operation, and after that operation is complete, indicates if it was successfully created or updated or if an error occurred. The value shall be the string "Processing", the string "Complete", or an error string starting with the value "Error".

parentID.description: the parent folder ID for this container/Folder

completionStatus.description: A string indicating if the object is still in the process of being created or updated by another operation, and after that operation is complete, indicates if it was successfully created or updated or if an error occurred. The value shall be the string "Processing", the string "Complete", or an error string starting with the value "Error".

children.description: Array with children ids and names. children will only be return if field=children will be added to the call

createdAt.description: date on which the entity was created

createdBy.description: id of the person who created the entity

lastModifiedAt.description: date on which the entity was last modified

lastModifiedBy.description: id of the person who updated the latest entity

transactionId.description: Transaction Id, it will come in error only response e.g. ac4418af-4ec4-4925-82b1-1f9ccf59dd7f

incidentId.description: incident Id, it will come in error only response e.g. 188aec53-4638-4b8c-8fab-9a29f427f1c3

iluserId.description: intralinks UserId of the authenticated user

rootId.description: id of the root for connected sotrage account, if there exists any

authenticationType.description: This will define the Authentication Type used for the provider

refreshToken.description: OAuth 2.0 refresh_token. Only required for refresh_token grant type.

tokenExpiry.description: time in seconds when token will expire

refreshTokenExpiry.description: time in seconds when refresh token will expire

providerId.description: unique Id for any service provider

rootId.description: id of the root for connected sotrage account, if there exists any
id of the root for connected sotrage account, if there exists any

errorId.description: Error ID of the error response (in case of error)

subCode.description: Subcode of the response/error status code
